Domenichino

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Study of an Old Man, a Younger Man, and a Woman
by Domenichino
Italy · 1601–1641 · Black chalk on ivory laid paper
Temperance
by Domenichino
Italy, 17th century · 1628–30 · black chalk heightened with white chalk, squared with black chalk
